allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms, System.Drawing
\\$screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds
\\$bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(\\$screen.Width, \\$screen.Height\)
\\$g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\(\\$bmp\)
\\$g.CopyFromScreen\(\\$screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, \\$screen.Size\)
\\$bmp.Save\('C:\\Users\\ludoc\\Desktop\\PDMApp\\debug_screen.png'\)
\\$g.Dispose\(\); \\$bmp.Dispose\(\)
Write-Host 'Screenshot salvo'
")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object { \\$_.ProcessName -match 'PDMApp|Exercicio|maui' -or \\$_.MainWindowTitle -match 'Exercicio' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, MainWindowTitle, CPU")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process PDMApp -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Name PDMApp -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Compress-Archive -Path 'C:\\Users\\ludoc\\Desktop\\PDMApp\\PDMApp.sln' -DestinationPath 'C:\\Users\\ludoc\\Desktop\\exercicio01Grupo05.zip' -Force; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\ludoc\\Desktop\\PDMApp\\PDMApp' -Exclude 'bin','obj' | Compress-Archive -DestinationPath 'C:\\Users\\ludoc\\Desktop\\exercicio01Grupo05.zip' -Update; Write-Host 'Done'")
